title: Hide Summary Row in Table View
excerpt: I’d like to be able to hide the Summary Row in the Table View.  When I don’t need it, it unnecessarily takes up valuable space on the board.

posts.author: Sionainn (Shannon)
posts.cookedHtml: I’d like to be able to hide the Summary Row in the Table View. When I don’t need it, it unnecessarily takes up valuable space on the board.

posts.author: TanyaB (Tanya B)
posts.cookedHtml: definately agree, in most cases I dont need it

posts.author: Nematode (Chris)
posts.cookedHtml: I find this clutters up the board when it’s not needed. For task management, I rarely need it. The ability to hide it when I want to would be great!
